flag_reason: The proband seed has no patient name, so the variant is necessarily limited to gender, birth date, identifier, and active status.
The newborn seed exposes only gender and birth date, so the two variants are intentionally close.
The floating-point height value is awkward; review first to ensure no downstream cleanup silently normalizes the number.
The exact numeric precision is faithful to the seed but slightly unnatural to read, so this variant is worth an editorial check.
The glucose seed includes linked subject and performer references; confirm the generated text does not imply extra linked-resource facts.
The concise stroke variant omits the explicit onset date even though the seed includes it.
